nasb.text: Then they cried to the Lord in their trouble, And He brought them out of their distresses.

esv.text: Then they cried to the Lord in their trouble, and he delivered them from their distress.

cnv.text: 於是他們在急難中呼求耶和華， 他就拯救他們脫離困苦。

ccb.text: 于是，他们在患难中呼求耶和华， 耶和华便拯救他们脱离困境。

csbs.text: 于是他们在危难中向耶和华呼求， 他就把他们从困境中领出来。
